calendar.matters:
Petition To Confirm Trust Assets And/Or Transfer Assets To Trust Under Probate Code 17200(A), 850 (A)(3), And 856
Off Calendar Apr-13-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Byron Sun appeared by zoom for Gary Ow (petitioner/trustee).

The court finds that the more expedient thing to do is to deem all four accounts (Franklin Account, Vanguard 403(b) Account, Vanguard Brokerage Account, BNY Mellon Account) as assets of the trust. The Petition to Confirm Trust Assets, etc. is under submission with the court's intent to grant.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.
